gh_ffe16aeba48ee05bf8013d15.title: [DevOps Engineer (AWS) Sênior] Sylision - Remoto
gh_ffe16aeba48ee05bf8013d15.description:
### 🎯 Cargo

DevOps Engineer (AWS)

### 🏢 Empresa

Sylision (recrutamento para empresa parceira)

### 📊 Nível de Experiência

Sênior

### 🏠 Modalidade de Trabalho

Remoto

### 📍 Localização

Brasil inteiro ou Portugal (remoto)

### 📝 Tipo de Contratação

CLT ou PJ

### 💱 Moeda

BRL

### 💰 Faixa Salarial

12.000 - 22.000

### 📋 Descrição da Vaga

Vaga de DevOps Engineer (AWS) nível Sênior para atuar em projetos de empresas parceiras da Sylision.

A [Sylision](https://sylision.com) é uma plataforma de recrutamento de tecnologia que atua no Brasil e em Portugal. Recrutamos para empresas parceiras e usamos IA para cruzar o seu CV com todas as vagas compatíveis do nosso banco em segundos — você se candidata uma única vez.

### ✅ Requisitos Técnicos

**Obrigatórios:**
- Experiência sólida com DevOps/AWS compatível com o nível Sênior
- Boas práticas de engenharia: versionamento, testes e code review

**Desejáveis:**
- Comunicação clara para trabalho remoto/distribuído
- Inglês para leitura de documentação

### 🎁 Benefícios

- Faixa salarial transparente (R$ 12.000–22.000/mês)
- Benefícios variam conforme a empresa contratante (detalhados na conversa com o headhunter)

### 🛠️ Stack/Tecnologias

- DevOps/AWS
- Boas práticas: CI/CD, IaC, observabilidade (varia conforme o projeto)

### 📧 Como se Candidatar

Candidate-se pela página da vaga: https://www.sylision.com/vagas/desenvolvedor-devops-aws-senior-remoto

Basta enviar o CV uma vez — a IA da Sylision considera seu perfil para esta e para todas as vagas compatíveis, inclusive as que abrirem depois.

### 🔗 Link da Vaga (opcional)

https://www.sylision.com/vagas/desenvolvedor-devops-aws-senior-remoto

gh_ff871b03fcabd20a93060047.title: [Hibrido / São Paulo, Brasil] Backend Developer na Coodesh
gh_ff871b03fcabd20a93060047.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/backend-developer-193718030?utm_source=github&utm_medium=phpdevbr-vagas&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋 Estamos buscando **Backend Developer**, sem restrição de nível para compor nosso time. **Responsabilidades:** ● Analisar metodologias e gerenciar o processo de desenvolvimento backend. ● Desenvolver e integrar módulos ao banco de dados. ● Elaborar documentação detalhada de códigos e processos. ● Integrar APIs com interfaces externas. ● Modelar e manter estruturas de bancos de dados. ● Projetar e implementar funcionalidades de aplicações. ● Apoiar a implementação e otimização de sistemas de software. ## Namu:

Começamos nossa trajetória em 2013 com o Portal Namu e desde então nos tornamos uma referência na produção de conteúdo multimídia de bem-estar. Temos a yoga, o pilates e a gastronomia como as principais vertentes da empresa, e mais de 8 milhões de páginas visualizadas compartilhamos ensinamentos em aulas, entrevistas e palestras com as maiores referências nacionais e internacionais. O grande sucesso das aulas de yoga, pilates e gastronomia, com mais de 10 milhões de visualizações no YouTube nos inspirou a criar o Namu Cursos, a primeira plataforma brasileira de cursos online completamente focada em uma vida equilibrada.

Em pouco mais de um ano construímos um portfólio que oferece a oportunidade e comodidade de praticar yoga onde e quando você quiser, com mais de 87 horas de aulas divididas entre 35 cursos. Os cursos são ministrados por professores de referência no Brasil que, em vários anos de estudos e experiência nas melhores escolas ou com os Gurus ao redor do mundo, se capacitaram para ensinar de forma didática e com preço acessível.

## Habilidades: - Node.js - PHP - AWS - Nest.JS - Laravel - Typescript - MySQL - Wordpress ## Local: São Paulo, Brasil ## Requisitos: - Experiência comprovada em testes via APIs. - Domínio de Node.js, JavaScript, TypeScript e PHP. - Proficiência em Git (BitBucket). - Experiência com metodologias ágeis de desenvolvimento. - Habilidade em desenvolvimento e integração de APIs REST/RESTful. - Conhecimento em bancos de dados relacionais (MySQL). - Familiaridade com tecnologias AWS (EC2, RDS, CloudWatch, S3, Lambda,...). - Experiência com conteinerização. - Conhecimento em Laravel, Nest.js e WordPress. ## Benefícios: - Convênio médico - Convênio odontológico - Day off de aniversário - Férias remuneradas Acesso à plataforma NAMU - Programa TEM Saúde ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Backend Developer na Namu](https://coodesh.com/jobs/backend-developer-193718030?utm_source=github&utm_medium=phpdevbr-vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Alocado #### Regime PJ #### Categoria Full-Stack

gh_ffbab03a0e31b6ecd2cefb44.title: 🔥 [資深] 3.5M/Y 前端軟體工程師 (全遠端) 🛠 Senior Front-End Engineer (Remote) 🚀
gh_ffbab03a0e31b6ecd2cefb44.description:
## **About Us**

We are a **rapidly growing software technology startup** from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT. Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago. As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

Are you seeking a company that transcends traditional constraints of location and time?

If you meet the following criteria, we want to work with you:

1. **Proactive and Independent:** Embrace the freedom to control your own working hours and enjoy the benefits of flexible schedules.
2. **Fully Remote:** Escape the confines of a traditional office setting and thrive in a fully remote work environment.
3. **Ownership and Involvement:** Crave a sense of involvement and autonomy, where your ideas and contributions are valued and recognized.
4. **Strong Entrepreneurial Spirit:** High-energy, possess an adventurous and startup mindset, unafraid of embracing unknown challenges.
5. **Passion for the International Product:** Fuel your ambition by working on projects that transcend borders and embrace the opportunity to collaborate with teams across different parts of the world.

If you are driven, hard-working, and ready to make a significant impact, we would love to hear from you. Join our team and embark on an exciting journey of innovation and growth!

**APPLY NOW:** **https://linktr.ee/growaha**

# **Job Description**

As our Senior Front-End Engineer, you are tasked with the development of engaging, intuitive, and visually compelling user interfaces for our web app product. You will work in close collaboration with designers and back-end engineers, and the marketing team, transmuting design mockups, user stories, and wireframes into high-quality code, thereby ensuring an immersive and seamless user experience.

### **Your Journey as a Senior Front-End Engineer**

1. Our front-end ecosystem is fortified with JavaScript, React, and Material UI (MUI), while we utilize React Native for mobile front-end development.
2. As front-end engineers, we take pride in precise design execution, valuing pixel-perfect implementation and employing Figma to maintain alignment with original designs.
3. Collaborative work culture is our ethos.
    - Work in tandem with a cross-functional team through the development cycle, from front-end frameworks, and front-end service design to deployment.
    - Engage in code reviews to elevate your work and that of your colleagues.
    - Write clean, reusable, and testable code for easy maintenance by yourself and your fellow software engineers.
    - Partner with engineers from various teams to create user-delighting features.
    - Collaborate with our design team to understand and address user pain points.
    - Drive enhancements in engineering standards, tooling, and processes.
    - Develop new tools for internal teams.
    - Embrace ownership and accountability for your work.
4. API integration is a critical part of your role.
    - Integrate APIs according to spec with front-end frameworks.
5. Build, mange, and reuse UI components effectively.
    - Keep UI components organized.
    - Reuse UI component to maximize efficiency, robustness, and user experience.
6. Troubleshooting and debugging are indispensable skills.
    - Investigate, debug, and upgrade existing software systems, including the development and integration of new components or automation pipelines as needed.
    - Address production issues across services.
7. Engage in the regular launch of new markets, features, or products.

### **What You Bring**

1. Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or related field.
2. Five or more years of coding experience or a similar role internship.
3. Proficiency in web development frameworks, especially JavaScript, React, and Material UI (MUI).
4. Experience with databases like PostgreSQL and SQL Server.
5. Familiarity with quality control testing using tools such as QUnit, Mocha, Jasmine, or RSpec.

With your craftsmanship, you'll help to shape the user interface of our software, driving our mission forward through stunning visual experiences. Are you ready to create?

### Additional Qualifications

We are seeking individuals who possess the following qualifications:

1. **Self-Motivation and Ownership:** Demonstrate self-motivation, a passion for continuous learning, and the ability to manage your own work effectively.
2. **User-Centric Mindset:** Show a strong desire to meet user needs and a relentless pursuit of achievement and excellence.
3. **Adaptability and Quick Learning:** Exhibit a customer-oriented approach, with the ability to quickly learn new skills and adapt to unfamiliar domains.
4. **Collaborative Spirit:** Display a willingness to actively participate in the team environment and collaborate effectively with diverse team members.

### Competitive Compensation

We offer competitive salary levels; details can be found at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha). Our salary structure includes flexible working hours, a fully remote setup, and monthly performance-based raises, bonuses, and rewards. 

### This Job Offers You

When you join our team, you can expect:

1. **Flexible and Independent Remote Work:** Enjoy the freedom of flexible working hours and the ability to work remotely.
2. **Performance-Based Rewards:** Receive rewards and bonuses based on your performance and contributions.
3. **Driven and Talented Co-workers:** Collaborate with a group of driven, creative, and multi-talented colleagues who share a deep passion for startups.
4. **Ownership and Impact:** Take direct ownership of your role and responsibilities, making a meaningful impact in our innovative culture.
5. **Learn to Solve Challenging Issues:** Work closely with teams dedicated to creating solutions for some of the most relevant and challenging issues.
6. **Positive Work Environment:** Thrive in a work environment built on trust, accountability, collaboration, curiosity, fearlessness, kindness, and respect.

Please review our **Pre-Interview Info at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha)** before applying.

Ready to join our team? **Apply now at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha)**.
